ucs.title: [LLM] 8Base/Phobos pre-encryption recovery-sabotage chain (vssadmin + bcdedit + wbadmin + firewall)
ucs.description: Hunts the characteristic 8Base (Phobos variant) pre-encryption sequence: shadow-copy deletion, BCD recovery disable, backup-catalog purge and host firewall disable executed in quick succession from the same parent. CISA AA23-150A documents this exact chain as 8Base's signature impact-stage tradecraft inherited from Phobos.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count as ActionEvents values(Processes.process) as cmds values(Processes.process_name) as bins dc(Processes.process_name) as distinct_actions min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent_proc values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name=vssadmin.exe Processes.process="*delete*shadows*") OR (Processes.process_name=wmic.exe Processes.process="*shadowcopy*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name=bcdedit.exe (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*no*" OR Processes.process="*ignoreallfailures*")) OR (Processes.process_name=wbadmin.exe Processes.process="*delete*catalog*") OR (Processes.process_name=netsh.exe Processes.process="*advfirewall*" Processes.process="*off*") by Processes.dest Processes.user _time span=10m | where distinct_actions>=2 AND NOT match(Processes.user,"\$$") | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort - firstTime
ucs.kql:
// 8Base/Phobos pre-encryption sabotage chain — 2+ distinct
// recovery-killing LOLBins from one parent process within 10 min.
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe"  and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete", "shadows"))
   or  (FileName =~ "wmic.exe"      and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy", "delete"))
   or  (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe"   and (ProcessCommandLine has "recoveryenabled no" or ProcessCommandLine has "ignoreallfailures"))
   or  (FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe"   and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete", "catalog"))
   or  (FileName =~ "netsh.exe"     and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("advfirewall", "off"))
   or  (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy","Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy"))
| summarize SabotageBins   = make_set(FileName),
            DistinctActions = dcount(FileName),
            FirstSeen      = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen       = max(Timestamp),
            Cmds           = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 15),
            Parent         = any(InitiatingProcessFileName),
            ParentCmd      = any(InitiatingProcessCommandLine)
  by DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessId,
     InitiatingProcessCreationTime, bin(Timestamp, 10m)
| where DistinctActions >= 2     // chained, not a one-off admin action
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// 8Base/Phobos pre-encryption sabotage chain on Sentinel SecurityEvent 4688.
// Requires the 'Include command line in process creation' GPO to be enabled.
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where (NewProcessName endswith "vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
    or (NewProcessName endswith "wmic.exe"    and CommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
    or (NewProcessName endswith "bcdedit.exe" and (CommandLine has "recoveryenabled no" or CommandLine has "ignoreallfailures"))
    or (NewProcessName endswith "wbadmin.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("delete","catalog"))
    or (NewProcessName endswith "netsh.exe"   and CommandLine has_all ("advfirewall","off"))
    or (NewProcessName has_any ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
        and CommandLine has_any ("Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy","Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy"))
| summarize SabotageBins    = make_set(NewProcessName),
            DistinctActions = dcount(NewProcessName),
            FirstSeen       = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen        = max(TimeGenerated),
            Cmds            = make_set(CommandLine, 15),
            Parent          = any(ParentProcessName)
  by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, 10m)
| where DistinctActions >= 2
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: 8Base/Phobos Pre-Encryption Recovery Sabotage
id: 8b4ce11e-8b4c-4ba5-b1a8-0008baf0b0501
status: experimental
description: Detects the LOLBin recovery-sabotage actions characteristic of 8Base / Phobos affiliates immediately before file encryption (shadow-copy deletion, BCD recovery flag flipping, backup catalog purge, firewall disable).
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-150a
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/13
tags:
  - attack.impact
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - attack.t1562.001
  - attack.t1562.004
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  vssadmin:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
  wmic_shadow:
    Image|endswith: '\wmic.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'shadowcopy'
      - 'delete'
  bcdedit:
    Image|endswith: '\bcdedit.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'recoveryenabled no'
      - 'ignoreallfailures'
  wbadmin:
    Image|endswith: '\wbadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'catalog'
  netsh_fw:
    Image|endswith: '\netsh.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'advfirewall'
      - 'off'
  condition: 1 of them
fields:
  - Image
  - CommandLine
  - ParentImage
  - ParentCommandLine
  - User
falsepositives:
  - Sanctioned backup software lifecycle scripts (allowlist by parent binary)
  - Forensic / IR responders running shadow-copy cleanup
level: high
ucs.rationale: 8Base is a Phobos-derived ransomware family — CISA AA23-150A and Mandiant reporting note the affiliate's near-identical reuse of the Phobos pre-encryption preparation routine. Phobos drops the same hardcoded ResetEnv batch that fires vssadmin/wmic shadow deletion, bcdedit recovery disable, wbadmin catalog wipe and netsh firewall disable back-to-back from a single parent. Chaining the detection on
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] 8Base RDP brute-force → successful logon from same external IP (T1133 + T1110 + T1078)
ucs.description: Correlates a burst of failed RDP logons from a public IP against an internet-facing host with a subsequent successful RDP logon from that same IP. 8Base's documented initial-access tradecraft is pure password-spray / brute-force against exposed RDP/VPN, followed by valid-account abuse — this chain catches the moment of compromise.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count as FailedCount values(Authentication.user) as FailedAccounts min(_time) as FirstFail max(_time) as LastFail from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.action=failure (Authentication.authentication_method=RDP OR Authentication.app=win:remote OR Authentication.signature_id=4625) by Authentication.dest Authentication.src | where FailedCount>=15 AND NOT cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8",src) AND NOT cidrmatch("172.16.0.0/12",src) AND NOT cidrmatch("192.168.0.0/16",src) | rename Authentication.dest as dest Authentication.src as src | join type=inner dest src [ | tstats summariesonly=t min(_time) as SuccessTime values(Authentication.user) as PwnedAccount from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.action=success (Authentication.authentication_method=RDP OR Authentication.app=win:remote OR Authentication.signature_id=4624) by Authentication.dest Authentication.src | rename Authentication.dest as dest Authentication.src as src ] | where SuccessTime>=FirstFail AND SuccessTime<=(LastFail+7200) | convert ctime(FirstFail) ctime(LastFail) ctime(SuccessTime) | table FirstFail LastFail SuccessTime dest src FailedCount FailedAccounts PwnedAccount | sort - SuccessTime
ucs.kql:
// 8Base initial-access pattern: external RDP brute-force followed by
// successful auth from same source IP within the brute-force window + 2h.
let WindowMin   = 30m;
let FailThresh  = 15;
let Brute =
    DeviceLogonEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType == "LogonFailed"
    | where LogonType == "RemoteInteractive"
    | where RemoteIPType == "Public"
    | summarize FailedCount    = count(),
                FailedAccounts = make_set(AccountName, 50),
                FirstFail      = min(Timestamp),
                LastFail       = max(Timestamp)
        by DeviceId, DeviceName, RemoteIP
    | where FailedCount >= FailThresh;
let Success =
    DeviceLogonEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType == "LogonSuccess"
    | where LogonType == "RemoteInteractive"
    | where RemoteIPType == "Public"
    | project SuccessTime  = Timestamp,
              DeviceId, DeviceName, RemoteIP,
              PwnedAccount = AccountName,
              IsLocalAdmin;
Brute
| join kind=inner Success on DeviceId, RemoteIP
| where SuccessTime between (FirstFail .. LastFail + 2h)
| project FirstFail, LastFail, SuccessTime, DeviceName, RemoteIP,
          FailedCount, PwnedAccount, IsLocalAdmin, FailedAccounts
| order by SuccessTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Sentinel SecurityEvent — RDP (LogonType 10) brute force then success from same IP.
let FailThresh = 15;
let Brute =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4625
    | where LogonType == 10
    | where isnotempty(IpAddress)
    | where not(ipv4_is_private(IpAddress))
        and not(IpAddress startswith "127.")
        and not(IpAddress startswith "169.254.")
    | summarize FailedCount    = count(),
                FailedAccounts = make_set(TargetUserName, 50),
                FirstFail      = min(TimeGenerated),
                LastFail       = max(TimeGenerated)
        by Computer, IpAddress
    | where FailedCount >= FailThresh;
let Success =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4624
    | where LogonType == 10
    | where isnotempty(IpAddress)
    | where not(ipv4_is_private(IpAddress))
    | project SuccessTime  = TimeGenerated,
              Computer, IpAddress,
              PwnedAccount = TargetUserName,
              LogonProcessName, AuthenticationPackageName;
Brute
| join kind=inner Success on Computer, IpAddress
| where SuccessTime between (FirstFail .. LastFail + 2h)
| project FirstFail, LastFail, SuccessTime, Computer, IpAddress,
          FailedCount, PwnedAccount, FailedAccounts,
          LogonProcessName, AuthenticationPackageName
| order by SuccessTime desc
ucs.rationale: CISA AA23-150A, VMware Carbon Black, and Acronis incident reporting consistently describe 8Base initial access as opportunistic brute-force or password-spray against exposed RDP and VPN endpoints (T1133), followed by valid-account abuse (T1078) — the group does not typically use spear-phish or zero-day exploitation as primary initial access. Counting failed-then-successful RDP from the same public
